calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Paula Shi, CSR# 13358. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-07-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories Set 1, Set Interrogatories, Request For Admissions Set 1, Request For Production Of Documents, Set 1, Attendance At Deposition & Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff 650 Second Street Owners' Association's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, Request For Admissions, Set One, Request For Production, Set One, Attendance At Deposition is granted in part and moot in part. As to the Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, and Request For Production, Set One, the motion is moot as further responses have been made. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. However, counsel is advised the court is not likely to sustain the objections that have been asserted. As to the Requests For Admissions, the motion is granted as it seeks an order overruling the objections and as the motion seeks further responses. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order.
Defendant is ordered to appear for his deposition on March 21, 2008 or March 25, 2008.
The court finds that the inadequate responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $975, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
